question: Which of the following is not true about why UA maintenance is important?

options.text: Check if any wiring is showing signs of wear, arcing and loose connections.
Allows us to carry out a more thorough inspection of the UA.
Anticipate failures by replacing failing or near-end-of-life components.
To keep the pilot occupied during a non-flying day.

classification_notes: Safety and operations topics are being tested.
